title: Tempting Tropical Mexican Beef Birria
description: A romantic Mexican dish featuring jalapeno and coconut cream, this low-carb-friendly birria is a twist on traditional Sonoran cuisine. It has a jammy and crumbly texture that is sure to delight.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the diced jalapeno peppers and cook until they start to soften.
Add the beef brisket and cook until it is browned on all sides.
Add the coconut cream, tomato paste, cumin, and paprika, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook until the beef is tender.
Shred the beef with two forks and continue to cook for an additional 10 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh cilantro and lime wedges.
